response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience (13+ years) with a strong match to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js) and complementary languages (Java, Kotlin, Python). His work in AI-agent infrastructure, scalable systems (handling millions of requests/sec), and open-source contributions demonstrate technical depth. While his recent AI-agent focus is a slight misalignment with the primary stack, his adaptability and problem-solving skills mitigate this concern.
strengths: 13+ years of full-stack development with direct experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven ability to build scalable systems (e.g., handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby) and optimize performance
Strong open-source contributions (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) and mentorship in software craftsmanship (e.g., TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: Recent AI-agent infrastructure work (re:cinq) may overshadow direct experience with Nest.js or Vitest
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL (though MongoDB and MySQL are present) or Kubernetes in recent roles
Primary role at re:cinq is very recent (April 2025), so long-term stability is unproven

key_factors.factor: recent AI-agent focus vs. job requirements
